title: marsdenia nicoyana
intro: Marsdenia nicoyana, also known as the Costa Rican milkvine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Marsdenia nicoyana include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Marsdenia nicoyana can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds for various health benefits.
